edify.configuration.threads.tooltip: Number of threads to use for operation scheduling. Increase for high core counts, decrease if you get lag spikes.
edify.configuration.threadsTicksPerSecon: How much a thread waits between processing schedules when the server signals ready.
edify.configuration.sleepWhenServerIsNot: Milliseconds to sleep when server is busy. Higher = less CPU usage, slower response.
edify.configuration.numberOfDirectlyProc: Number of operations to process before sleeping. Higher = more responsive, more CPU.
edify.configuration.timeToSleepBetweenBa: Milliseconds to sleep between batches of operations.
edify.configuration.ticksToBatchRemovalO: Server ticks to wait before processing queued block removals. Higher = fewer concurrent scans but slower response.
edify.configuration.maxConcurrentScans.t: Maximum concurrent group scans. More = faster but higher memory usage.
edify.configuration.limit.tooltip: Maximum blocks per group scan. Too high = false positives, too low = missed floating structures.
edify.configuration.scanPerTick.tooltip: Blocks to scan per server tick. Higher = faster scans, more CPU usage.
edify.configuration.blocksPerFloatingSup: How many solid blocks a single floating support block can hold up.
edify.configuration.floatingSupportsNatu: Max floating blocks before treating a structure as a natural island (optimization for the End).
edify.configuration.nonBedrockFoundation: Chance for a non-bedrock block connected to bedrock to be a foundation. 0 = only bedrock, 1 = all natural blocks.
edify.configuration.enabled.tooltip: When enabled, overstressed structures break apart progressively. Disable for collapse-only mode.
edify.configuration.mode.tooltip: PHYSICS: structures fall with gravity and collide. ACE_OF_SPADES: structures pause mid-air then break apart in place.
edify.configuration.useDebris.tooltip: Whether collapses produce debris piles. When off, blocks are fully destroyed.
edify.configuration.aceOfSpadesDelay.too: Ticks the floating structure stays visible before breaking in Ace of Spades mode.
